caption: A man with a white beard and glasses, wearing a light-colored Nehru jacket over a matching shirt, stands behind a light-colored podium. He is positioned in front of a textured green wall with a geometric pattern. Two thin microphones extend from the podium toward him. To his right, a slender glass vase containing thin brown branches is set atop a brown pedestal with gold accents. In the initial moments, the man raises his right hand with his index finger pointed upward to emphasize a point. As the sequence progresses, he lowers his hand and moves it toward the podium, while continuing to speak. The background and equipment remain static throughout the scene, focusing entirely on the man's gestures and facial expressions as he delivers a presentation.
